mapper.sql: id, user_id, dept_id, committee, position, start_date, end_date, sub_user_id, sub_date, data_status, sys_no, branch, audit_status, audit_desc, audit_user_id, audit_date, committee_branch, part_time_type, year, create_user_id, create_date, create_time, submit_time
mapper.select: select sapt.id as rowId , puser.id as "userId.id",puser.name as "userId.name",puser.name as userName, csci.code as "committee.id",csci.name as "committee.name",csci.name as committeeName,sapt.branch as branch, csy.code as "year.id",csy.name as "year.name",sdept.id as "deptId.id",sdept.name as "deptId.name",sdept.name as deptName, cspj.code as "position.id",cspj.name as "position.name",cspj.name as positionName, cspt.code as "partTimeType.id",cspt.name as "partTimeType.name",cspt.name as partTimeTypeName, sapt.start_date as startDate,sapt.end_date as endDate,sapt.data_status as dataStatus from srm_ac_parttime_apply sapt left join ct_srm_user puser on puser.id=sapt.user_id left join ct_srm_committee_info csci on csci.code=sapt.committee left join ct_srm_year csy on csy.code=sapt.year left join ct_srm_parttime_job cspj on cspj.code=sapt.position left join ct_srm_parttime_type cspt on cspt.code=sapt.part_time_type left join ct_srm_dept sdept on sdept.id=sapt.dept_id where sapt.id=#{rowId}
mapper.update:
update srm_ac_parttime_apply
data_status = #{status},
audit_status = #{checkStatus},
where id=#{rowId}
